chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI JCM No. 11 of 2003 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge For Arguments. 30.04.2026. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Ayaz Ahmed Ansari, Advocate for the Respondent.......... None has appeared on behalf of the Petitioner nor has any intimation been received. This matter has been pending for over 25 years without any significant progress. A perusal of the Order Sheets shows that no one has been appearing on behalf of the Petitioner. It appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this matter. Accordingly, the instant JCM is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ayaz
